title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Look at the question and the ideas around it. Discuss each idea with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.centralQuestion: What are the pros and cons of different energy sources for the future?
content.decisionTask: Now decide which two energy sources offer the best prospects for a sustainable future.

script.text: I'd like you to look at this question and these ideas, and talk together about the pros and cons of different energy sources.
Now you have about a minute to decide which two energy sources are the most promising for the future.
